blocks.label: Rainwater Drainage
blocks.text:
The Supplier shall install rainwater drainage:

Pipe material: {{pipeMaterial}}
Pipe diameter: {{pipeDiameter}} mm
Total estimated length: {{pipeLength}} m
Manholes / inspection chambers: {{manholeQty}} pieces

The Supplier shall excavate trenches, lay pipes at correct falls, backfill, compact, and reinstate.
Camera inspection and leakage test upon completion: included.

blocks.label: Foul Water Connection
Infiltration System
blocks.text:
Infiltration system:

Type: {{infiltrationType}}
Storage capacity: {{infiltrationCapacity}} litres
Infiltration area: {{infiltrationArea}} m²

The Supplier shall confirm capacity calculations per local water authority requirements.

blocks.label: Applicable Standards
blocks.text:
All works shall comply with:

- NEN 3215 (domestic drainage installations)
- NEN-EN 1401 (PVC-U pipe systems)
- KOMO / KIWA certified pipes and fittings
- Municipal drainage requirements and connection permits
- Waterschapsverordening (water authority regulations)

Safety: VCA** certification required.

Attach: VCA certificate, camera inspection report, leakage test report, as-built drawings.

overrides.ch5_priceBreakdownItems:
Per m1 pipe laid (per diameter)
Per piece: manhole / inspection chamber
Per m² infiltration system
Per connection: municipal sewer connection
Camera inspection: lump sum
Leakage test: lump sum
Mobilisation / demobilisation: lump sum
overrides.ch5_surchargeItems:
- Minimum order surcharge
- Rock or obstruction removal
- Additional depth beyond specification
- Weekend working
overrides.ch6_exclusionItems:
- Building drainage inside building (by others)
- Roof drainage systems (by others)
- Foundation works
- Permits (by STM)
- Road works and traffic measures
- VAT
overrides.ch7_requiredDocuments:
1. Price schedule — per m1, per piece, lump sums
2. Method statement
3. VCA** certificate
4. Material certificates (KOMO/KIWA)
5. Estimated duration
6. As-built drawing commitment
7. General terms and conditions
8. All deviations with justification
